summary: Ship: S-1 is resolved. The reconciled ID is conditionally committed at the App state boundary, preventing later active-state changes or reintroduced IDs from stealing selection. The successful-create path now selects only after command success. No new critical issue was introduced by the fix.
triage: Clean verdict: note it in your report and COMMIT this artifact with the next bookkeeping commit.
next_steps: Focused Vitest execution was blocked by the read-only sandbox because pnpm attempted to create a temporary workspace file; rerun `pnpm vitest --run src/features/profiles/selection.test.ts` in a writable environment.
